2360800.name: Qubica
2360800.description:
Qubica is next-generation sandbox game heavily inspired by The Blockheads. All about exploring, building, and playing together. Mine resources, craft tools, build a cozy cabin or an entire city.

Explore, Build, and Survive

Play solo or with friends as you gather resources, craft tools, and shape the world however you want. Whether you prefer quiet exploration or massive builds.

Play With Friends, Anywhere

With cross-platform multiplayer, You can host a server on your PC and have friends join from other platforms, including mobile.

Built by the Community

Qubica is being built alongside its players. We’re a small team, and player feedback helps us guide the game’s direction. Balance changes, features, and improvements come from the community.

Modding

Modding is a large part of Qubica. The game is designed to be extended using Lua, allowing players to add new items, mechanics, and textures via the Steam Workshop.

Development status

Qubica is currently in active development, and we’re focused on making a long-lasting game. If you want to follow progress, share ideas, or help shape the future of the game, join us on Discord.

Pick up your tools, place your first block, and start building your world.
